sections.changelog:
0.2.6

  • Fix: flush rewrite rules on version change so gallery-image permalinks resolve immediately
  • Fix: fake featured image via metadata filter so SearchIQ shows thumbnails (images stay in Supabase)
  • Store _pg_image_url post meta on every sync

0.2.3

  • Fix: bust metadata cache on wp_update_plugins so Check Again works immediately

0.2.2

  • Add pg_gallery_image CPT for SearchIQ indexing
  • Add sync-image endpoint: creates/updates stub posts from PostGlider Media Vault

0.2.1

  • Fix: add Authorization: Bearer header required by Supabase API gateway
